title.en: The first floor of the Mist Tower.

content.en:
The first floor of the Mist Tower.

Ye Tian quickly fought with the opponent on this floor. The opponent on this floor was an opponent condensed by rules. His cultivation was also the 35th floor, and his strength was not strong.

He killed him in one move.

After that, he came to the second floor of the Mist Tower.

The opponent on the second floor of the Mist Tower was not strong either. Ye Tian still killed him in one move and easily came to the third floor.

Facing the opponent on the third floor, Ye Tian did not feel the difficulty and easily killed him.

Then it was the fourth floor!

The fifth floor!

Ye Tian easily defeated them and came to the sixth floor.

He only needed to defeat the opponent on the sixth floor to join the Mist Pavilion.

And the opponent on the sixth floor was indeed very strong. He was an opponent of the Ultimate Chonggong level, but he only knew one Ultimate Chonggong secret method.

Boom! ! !

Ye Tian fought with the opponent of this level, showing all his strength, using the Extreme Blood Armor, Extreme Blood Blade, and Extreme Blood Escape.

The ultimate Chonggong secret method used by the opponent of this level is the Thunder Blade. When it is used, countless Thunder Blade phantoms are spread across many time and space, and it is impossible to dodge.

However, the countless Thunder Blades bombarded on the Extreme Blood Armor, and could not break Ye Tian's defense at all.

If it were any other cultivator of the 35th Heaven, they would have died under the Thunder Blade, and even many cultivators of the 35th Heaven would have been killed.

Unfortunately, such an attack could not threaten Ye Tian.

"Die!"

Ye Tian's Extreme Blood Blade slashed at the opponent, and the opponent did not dodge.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian used the Extreme Blood Escape to transform into countless phantoms, shuttled through many time and space, and the speed was too fast. In an instant, he slashed the opponent countless times.

"This condensed opponent is very strong. Although he only knows one ultimate Chonggong secret method, his body is very strong, and he has almost tempered his body to the limit. I have been practicing for too short a time, and my body has not been tempered to the limit. If I continue to temper my body, I can increase my physical strength several times!"

However, he still beat this opponent with three ultimate Chonggong secret methods.

Soon, this opponent was completely killed by Ye Tian and passed the sixth floor of the Mist Tower.

After passing the sixth floor, he didn't need to break through the seventh floor. Maybe there was a small probability that he could break through, but he didn't need to be so high-profile.

Now he only needs to join the Mist Pavilion and use the resources of the Mist Pavilion to improve himself and become the ultimate palace master as soon as possible.

...

Wanchong Mountain.

Mist Pavilion Branch.

A figure opened his eyes.

This is the ultimate palace master guarding the Wanchong Mountain Branch of the Mist Pavilion - Yang Yuan!

However, few people in the outside world know of his existence.

"In Wanchong Mountain, a cultivator has passed through the sixth floor of the Mist Tower!!!!"

Yang Yuan was very shocked. You know, for countless years, no cultivator has passed throughThe sixth level, after all, the truly top practitioners of the big forces will not join the Mist Pavilion, and the practitioners of the general forces have no hope of passing the sixth level without the ultimate Chonggong technique and the ultimate Chonggong secret technique they created.

This requirement is too difficult, which has caused the Mist Pavilion to not recruit talents from the outside world for a long time.

Of course, the Mist Pavilion has many strong people, and it would rather be short than unqualified. It will never accept a genius who is not a true monster.

At this time.

After Ye Tian came out of the Mist Tower, he was directly teleported to an altar of the Mist Pavilion branch.

At this time, Yang Yuan appeared instantly.

"Hello, senior!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He knew that the person in front of him was an ultimate palace master. In his time and space line, he was comparable to the ancient demon-level strongman or the ultimate supreme existence. In the eyes of his original body, he was like an ant, but in front of the clone of this time and space line, he was naturally an unmatched and terrifying existence.

"What's your name?"

Yang Yuan asked.

"Ye Tian!" Ye Tian introduced himself.

"Are you interested in joining Wu Pavilion?" Yang Yuan invited.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian said immediately.

"Okay, from now on, you are a member of Wu Pavilion. Let's go. I'll take you to handle some formalities."

Yang Yuan took Ye Tian to handle the formalities and let Ye Tian successfully join Wu Pavilion.

In the following days, Ye Tian stayed in Wu Pavilion and learned about the strength of Wu Pavilion. This was information that could not be obtained from Gui Lao.

There are three eternal ultimate palace masters in Wu Pavilion, one hundred and thirty-six ultimate palace masters, and many practitioners in the thirty-sixth heaven. They are all descendants of many ultimate palace masters. They do not need any conditions and can easily join Wu Pavilion.

·· ·······Please give me flowers·· ·····

·· ·······Please give me flowers·· ·····

"Wu Ge is quite powerful!"

Ye Tian said secretly.

Soon after joining Wu Ge, he showed his level as a secret master, which shocked Yang Yuan.

"Palace Master Yang, I want to exchange for the top-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe."

Ye Tian applied.

"Yes, if you can refine a top-level Chonggong Jindan with a purity of more than 70%, Wu Ge can provide you with resources so that you can refine it with peace of mind. Moreover, there are contribution points to be gained." Yang Yuan said.

"Thank you, Lord Yang!"

.... .... ...

Ye Tian quickly exchanged a top-level secret recipe for a heavy palace golden elixir from the Mist Pavilion. This top-level heavy palace golden elixir is called the Purple Mist Golden Elixir. The main material is a kind of mist golden grass material, which can only be collected in the strange gray fog area around the fog area.

If you are not the Ultimate Palace Master, you can't step into the gray fog area at all.

Therefore, the mist golden grass is a material that only the Ultimate Palace Master can collect, soThere is no such material in the outside world, but there are many such materials in the Mist Pavilion.

After he got the secret recipe of the Purple Mist Golden Pill, he began to refine the Purple Mist Golden Pill. With his level, he soon refined a Purple Mist Golden Pill with a purity of more than 70%. He immediately gained the attention of Yang Yuan, who provided him with a large amount of materials so that he could refine it with peace of mind.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already demonstrated the top-level heavy palace golden pill Purple Mist Golden Pill with a purity of 95%, but in fact he was already able to refine a 100% pure Purple Mist Golden Pill.

Using a large amount of Purple Mist Golden Pill, he accumulated a lot of contribution points, and his own cultivation also broke through to the 36th heaven, and gradually reached the limit of the 36th heaven, only one step away from the ultimate palace master realm.

However, this step is very difficult. You must understand the ultimate heavy palace rules and reach a certain realm before you can impact the ultimate palace master realm.

This day.

Ye Tian came to ask Yang Yuan for advice. He wanted to know if there was a place in the Mist Pavilion that could help him comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Palace. He thought there must be one in the Mist Pavilion.

Sure enough, after he asked, Yang Yuan gave a positive answer. Go ahead.
